posts.author: Van2a (Vanessa CENTRONI)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I would like to have the possibility to increase the width of the column in graph widget to have a better visibility of the text. The problem is for horizontal column graph, you have the text on the left and it is limited to 12 characters.
